nasb.text: But evil will come on you Which you will not know how to charm away; And disaster will fall on you For which you cannot atone; And destruction about which you do not know Will come on you suddenly.

esv.text: But evil shall come upon you, which you will not know how to charm away; disaster shall fall upon you, for which you will not be able to atone; and ruin shall come upon you suddenly, of which you know nothing.

cnv.text: 但災禍必臨到你身上， 你卻不知道它的來源； 禍患必落在你身上， 你卻不能把它除去； 毀滅必忽然臨到你身上， 你卻不知道。

ccb.text: 你必大祸临头， 不知如何祛灾避祸。 灾祸必落在你身上， 无可挽回。 你意想不到的祸患必突然来到。

csbs.text: 但灾祸必临到你， 你却不知如何消解； 灾难必落在你身上， 你却无法赎清； 毁灭必突然临到你， 你却意料不到。
